## [00:00 - 01:20]

How much is the way you speak costing you right now? You know, I looked up a piece of research by the Super Serious Society of Employers, also known as the National Association of Colleges and Employers, and one of the reports showed that communication skills were ranked as the most crucial skill set that employers seek in New Heights. Communication skills actually scored 4.56 on a five-point scale. It was also another piece of research and study done by the American Psychological Association that showed 50 to 80 percent of our workdays are spent communicating. It kind of makes sense why employers rate this skill so highly, right? It's the skill we use most often at work and in our everyday lives. If you really think about it, this next one I'm going to share with you. It's not a stat, but it's something that I've noticed after teaching this skill for over a decade. People who don't learn how to communicate well, they feel unfulfilled, they feel unsatisfied, they feel unheard, and they're unhappy. I'm running a free two-hour masterclass on communication skills next week. If you want to join me live with thousands of other people from around the world, just click the link in my profile to register. Spots are limited. Let's learn one of the most valuable skill sets that helps us amplify everything we do in life.
